query: SELECT dr.*, a.nome as aluno_nome FROM disc_resultados dr LEFT JOIN alunos a ON dr.aluno_id = a.id WHERE dr.score_d = '100' AND dr.score_i = '100' AND dr.score_s = '100' AND dr.score_c = '100'
